name: Dofamine VR
short_description: An atmospheric first-person VR puzzle game: explore a science facility, solve mysteries, uncover the cause of catastrophe. Single-player experience.
detailed_description:
Dofamine VR is an immersive first-person VR puzzle game set in a sci-fi environment, where you navigate a dark laboratory to uncover the cause of a catastrophic event. Blending exploration, logical puzzles, interactive environments, and tense atmosphere, this game offers a memorable journey.

Story
In a scientific facility experimenting with the “God Particle” (the Higgs boson), something catastrophic occurred. You take the role of an investigator trying to piece together what happened: find clues, reconstruct hidden connections, and reveal the truth behind the disaster.

Gameplay
Each level combines puzzle-solving and exploration:

  • Analyze surroundings and gather clues

  • Reconstruct links, information blocks, decode relationships

  • Interact with scientific devices and lab elements

  • Story delivered via environment and audio cues

Features
• VR puzzles and exploration: complete immersion in virtual reality.
• Sci-fi atmosphere and high-tech laboratory setting.
• Emphasis on thought over action: logic, combinations, intuition.
• Single-player narrative experience with deep ambiance.
• Audio design and music heighten suspense.

vr puzzle, vr mystery, vr science game, virtual reality lab, higgs boson experiment, vr investigation, vr exploration, vr logic puzzles, vr atmospheric, vr sci-fi
